Notice Of Plaintiffs Motion To Compel Discovery Responses Pursuant To Court Order The Production Of Def. Nguyen For The Purpose Of Taking Defs Deposition And For Evidence Sanctions And Further Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-20-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ian P. Wilson, esq. (408-286-0880) of Ericksen Arbuthnot for Plaintiff/Moving party.
Mahal Montoya, esq. (415-741-9028) for and with Defendant/opposing party Lamax Nguyen.

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFs WYATT LIN and 1944 OCEAN COOPERATIVE, INC.'s Motion To Compel Discovery Responses Pursuant To Court Order The Production Of Def. Nguyen For The Purpose Of Taking Defs Deposition And For Evidence Sanctions And Further Monetary Sanctions.

The motion for issue or evidence sanctions is DENIED. In all other respects the motion is GRANTED. The request for sanctions is GRANTED in the amount of $1,860.00. No opposition filed. 5 days to respond.

Order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Noah Lebowitz, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
